Description: Enrich accepted day photos with normalized records and deterministic similarity helpers before clustering.

Stories.StoryDescription: Define the accepted-photo clustering record with day name, relative path, capture metadata, dimensions, orientation, quality metrics, and deterministic similarity helpers.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The codebase exposes a stable accepted-photo schema for Epic 2 preprocessing and clustering.

Stories.StoryName: Load accepted photos from day roots
Stories.StoryDescription: Read accepted photos from the root of each dayXX directory while excluding rejected, not_photo, and manifest files.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Epic 2 preprocessing reads only accepted day-root photos from existing day folders.

Stories.StoryDescription: Compute local preprocessing descriptors including perceptual hash, normalized color histogram, and capture-time metadata.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each accepted-photo record includes deterministic similarity descriptors for burst grouping.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add unit tests covering accepted-photo discovery, day-folder filtering, and deterministic descriptor extraction.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests verify accepted-photo discovery and descriptor stability.
